summary: Implemented the payment strike system end-to-end: added PaymentStrikeCount and LockedByPaymentStrikes on User with DataSeeder migration; created UserPaymentStrikeService (+1 on forfeit, -1 on successful payment, auto-lock at 3 with admin notifications, admin unlock resets to 2/3); hooked into AuctionSettlementServiceImpl, AuctionPaymentServiceImpl, and AdminUserController; extended UserProfileResponse and AdminUserDTO; updated profile and admin users UI with i18n. Backend compiles successfully.
current_status: Payment strike feature is complete per plan. Restart backend to apply DB column migration. Manual test: forfeit flow, payment strike reduction, auto-lock at 3, admin unlock to 2/3, profile and admin users display.
